reasoning: The explosion VFX (vfx_explosion_2_v04) is approximately 70-80px in diameter compared to the player character at ~40-50px, giving a ratio of roughly 1.5-1.6x player size. For an explosion-category effect this is appropriate — VFX are expected to exceed player footprint to convey impact, and this one stays well below screen-overwhelming scale. The circular fire-ring with bright core reads cleanly in top-down orthographic perspective, consistent with the brick-floor scene. Pixel art style matches surrounding assets. No perspective inconsistency, no scene-overwhelming bloom or radius, and the effect does not obscure critical gameplay area disproportionately. Toy-diorama feel is preserved: the effect feels like a contained in-world event rather than a full-screen wallpaper overlay.
